title: ClawOS Genesis — Day One Setup

agentsUsed.name: Claw 🦞
agentsUsed.role: Orchestrator — planned and built entire system

notes: First boot session. Built the entire ClawOS infrastructure from scratch: memory system (daily notes + long-term), project-manager and wellness-tracker skills, and the full dashboard UI. Diagnosed Telegram bot token 401 issue. Desktop shortcut created. Gateway port randomized to 24830 for security.

title: Agent System — 131 Specialized Agents Deployed

agentsUsed.name: Claw 🦞
agentsUsed.role: Fetched repo, curated agents, built dispatch system

notes: Installed 131 specialized agent profiles from VoltAgent's awesome-claude-code-subagents repo. Categories: Core Dev, Language Specialists, Infrastructure, Quality/Security, Data/AI, Developer Experience, Specialized Domains, Business/Product, Meta/Orchestration, Research/Analysis. Model tiers: opus (deep reasoning), sonnet (everyday coding), haiku (lightweight).

title: Dashboard v2 — Agent Tracking + History Page

agentsUsed.name: Claw 🦞
agentsUsed.role: Full rewrite of dashboard with sync engine + history

notes: Rewrote the ClawOS Dashboard (v1→v2, 69KB). Added embedded JSON sync block for cross-session agent tracking, persistent History page with expandable session summaries, archive button for tasks, improved activity feed with typed badges, enhanced agents page with model/session info.
